items.title: Get a $650 discount and $214 in FREE gear with ENGWE’s L20 3.0 full suspension utility e-bike at second-best $1,349 rate
items.summary:
There are two days left to jump on ENGWE’s 12th Anniversary e-bike savings, and we wanted to shine a final spotlight on the third commuting solution in the lineup. You can find ENGWE’s L20 3.0 Full Suspension Anti-Theft Long-Range Utility e-bike coming with a $214 FREE bundle of gear down at $1,349 shipped, after using the code DEAL50 at checkout (which also works on the other e-bikes in the sale, too). This model would run you $1,999 without discounts and $2,013 were the bundled gear not also free, with the discounts we’ve tracked over the last year since its release having gone as low as $1,299. For two more days, you can score a 30% markdown here for $650 in savings ($864 total savings, factoring in the bundle) that gives you the second-lowest price we have tracked. Head below to learn more about this particular model, or check out the full lineup of deals in our original coverage of this sale here.

items.title: Don’t miss the HyperX Alloy Origins 60 compact RGB gaming keyboard while it’s 40% off at $60 low
items.summary:
Over at Amazon, you’ll find the HyperX Alloy Origins 60 mechanical gaming keyboard in black currently going for $59.99 shipped. This keyboard typically goes for around $100 and has climbed as high as $115 in recent months, but today’s deal cuts $55 off for a solid 40% discount. While this linear switch variant has dipped lower in the past, it hasn’t gone below the $60 mark in quite a while, and this now matches the lowest price we’ve tracked for it this year. It’s one of the more reliable gaming keyboards that’s been around for a while now as a popular pick, particularly for beginners or folks who are picking up their first compact 60% gaming keyboard, and it’s available at a solid price right now if you want to give it a try.

items.title: Today only: Score a Samsung 32-inch QHD 180Hz Odyssey G5 gaming monitor for $220 (Save $110)
items.summary:
Today only, as part of its Deals of the Day offers, Best Buy has listed one of Samsung’s 32-inch Odyssey G5 gaming monitors for $219.99 shipped. This G51F model, which is exclusive to Best Buy, originally hit the scene for $350, but it has more recently been going for $330. Today’s offer shaves $110 off that price to mark the lowest we have tracked for this particular version. While we have seen other Odyssey G5 displays – including the G55C, which is a similarly-specced model at Amazon – go for less, the G51F featured at Best Buy’s Deals of the Day offer has never gone for less. Besides that, it’s a solid choice for a 180Hz QHD gaming display from one of the big name brands like Samsung we feature a lot around here, so it’s definitely worth a look today.
